sentences.english: If I could go anywhere, I'd go to the Maldives.
sentences.korean: 어디든 갈 수 있다면 몰디브에 갈 거예요.

sentences.english: I just want to relax on a beach and do nothing.
sentences.korean: 해변에서 쉬면서 아무것도 안 하고 싶어요.

sentences.english: I'd love to visit Japan, especially during cherry blossom season.
sentences.korean: 일본에 가보고 싶어요, 특히 벚꽃 시즌에요.

sentences.english: The culture and the food look amazing.
I've always wanted to do a road trip across the United States.
sentences.korean: 미국 횡단 로드트립을 항상 하고 싶었어요.

sentences.english: Just driving from coast to coast sounds like an incredible adventure.
sentences.korean: 해안에서 해안까지 그냥 운전하는 건 엄청난 모험처럼 들려요.
